q: Surface tension is the tendency of the surface of a liquid to behave like a stretched ___.
___ refers to forces between molecules of the same substance.
The SI unit of surface tension is ___.
___ action is defined as the spontaneous flow of a liquid into a narrow tube or porous material.
___ refers to forces between molecules of different substances.
Liquids that rise in small bore tubes inserted into the liquid are said to ___ the tube.
Capillarity does not occur for ___-wetting liquids.
The actual amount of rise in a capillary tube depends on the ___ tension $\gamma$.
